ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (charter, public, etc.) */,
  "grades" TEXT /* Grade levels served by the school */,
  "students" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled in the school */,
  "pt_ratio" INTEGER /* Teacher-to-student ratio in the school */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* ZIP code of the school's location */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the school was established */,
  "website" TEXT /* School's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school location */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the school */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the school is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the school is located */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* ZIP code of the school's location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geographic latitude of the school's location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geographic longitude of the school's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_locations_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, analyst, staff, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level of the enrolled students */,
  "students" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled at the specified grade level */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the enrollment data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., graduation rate, test scores) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the performance data was reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_performance_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_enrollments, edit_performance) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "note" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_notes_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)
